name: ndexagent biorxiv-daily-scan 2026-03-11 (scan e)
description: Daily bioRxiv scan for HPMI-relevant papers, scan e (fifth run of 2026-03-11). Web search fallback (bioRxiv API blocked by egress proxy). No new influenza HPMI papers within 3-day window (March 8-11). Four previously unidentified papers found outside the window — bovine mammary H5N1 cytokine profiling (0.55), pathogen-pathogen interactions (0.30), H3N2 antigenic drift in swine (0.40), and natural H5N1 immunity in dairy cows (0.50). None scored >= 0.6 for Tier 2 review. Field publication rate remains low for this period.

v.name: Compartmentalized cytokine networks in bovine mammary H5N1
v.annotation: Intramammary H5N1 B3.13 challenge; compartment-resolved cytokine/chemokine profiling

v.name: Vaccine-induced antigenic drift H3N2 in swine
v.annotation: Antigenic drift in swine, glycan binding/sialic acid avidity changes

v.name: Natural H5N1 immunity in dairy cows: durable and cross-protective
v.annotation: Natural immunity characterization post-H5N1 dairy cow infection
